_publications._publicationTitle: Human cutaneous neurofibroma matrisome revealed by single-cell RNA sequencing.

_contextSnippet: fibroblast activated protein (FAP), and collagen type XI (COL11A1), markers of activated/cancer-associated fibroblasts, are expressed at very low levels
details: Successfully demonstrated low expression of FAP in cutaneous and plexiform neurofibromas compared to keloid positive controls
